title: Marketplace Manager - Tata CLiQ - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Tata CLiQ - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!
